# Ahmed Nobi — Senior Android Engineer & KMP Specialist

> This file provides AI assistants and language models with structured information about Ahmed Nobi and this website.

## About

Ahmed Nobi is a Senior Android Engineer with over 7 years of expertise in architecting and scaling high-performance, user-centric mobile applications. He specializes in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), Jetpack Compose, and Server-Driven UI (SDUI).

## Current Role

Senior Android Developer at Cashi (Cairo, Egypt), leading the Consumer Squad. Building fintech applications with 5M+ downloads and 99.9% uptime.

## Core Expertise

- Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP): Ktor, Koin, Room, Multiplatform Settings, Gradle, shared business logic across Android and iOS
- Android: Jetpack Compose, SDUI, MVVM, MVI, Coroutines, Flow
- Fintech: Electronic payments, high-concurrency transaction processing, offline-first architecture
- CI/CD: CircleCI, GitHub Actions, Bitbucket Pipelines
- Leadership: Technical mentorship, cross-functional team leadership, curriculum development

## Links

- Website: https://ahmednobii.me
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ahmednobii
- GitHub: https://github.com/ahmednobii

- / — Homepage with About, Experience, Skills, and Projects
